---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed publications by Laszlo Szabo on kidney and pancreas transplantation, organ preservation, donor risk stratification, and surgical outcomes."
title-block-banner: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(bibtex)

clean_latex <- function(txt) {
  if (is.null(txt) || txt == "") return(NULL)
  txt <- gsub("\\{\\{|\\}\\}", "", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\{\\$<\\$\\}", "&lt;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\{\\$>\\$\\}", "&gt;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\%", "%", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\{\\$\\\\cdot\\$\\}", "&middot;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\$\\\\cdot\\$", "&middot;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\{\\\\textpm\\}", "&plusmn;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\textpm", "&plusmn;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\{\\\\textendash\\}", "&ndash;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\textendash", "&ndash;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\{\\\\textemdash\\}", "&mdash;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\textemdash", "&mdash;", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\'\\{([a-zA-Z])\\}", "\\1", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\`\\{([a-zA-Z])\\}", "\\1", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\\\^\\{([a-zA-Z])\\}", "\\1", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\\"\\{([a-zA-Z])\\}", "\\1", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\{([^}]*)\\}", "\\1", txt)
  txt <- gsub("\\\\[a-zA-Z]+", "", txt)
  txt
}

pub_card_html <- function(title, authors, meta, doi, pmid, abstract) {
  actions <- ""

  if (!is.null(doi) && doi != "") {
    actions <- paste0(actions,
      '<a href="https://doi.org/', doi, '" class="pub-btn" ',
      'target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>\n')
  }

  if (!is.null(pmid) && pmid != "") {
    actions <- paste0(actions,
      '<a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/', pmid, '/" class="pub-btn" ',
      'target="_blank" rel="noopener">PubMed</a>\n')
  }

  if (!is.null(doi) && doi != "") {
    actions <- paste0(actions,
      '<a href="https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=', doi, '" ',
      'class="pub-btn pub-btn-zotero" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Add to Zotero</a>\n')
  }

  if (!is.null(abstract) && abstract != "") {
    actions <- paste0(actions,
      '<details class="pub-abstract-details">\n',
      '<summary class="pub-btn pub-btn-abstract">Abstract</summary>\n',
      '<div class="pub-abstract-body">', abstract, '</div>\n',
      '</details>\n')
  }

  paste0(
    '<div class="pub-card">\n',
    '<p class="pub-title">', title, '</p>\n',
    '<p class="pub-authors">', authors, '</p>\n',
    '<p class="pub-meta">', meta, '</p>\n',
    '<div class="pub-actions">\n', actions, '</div>\n',
    '</div>\n\n'
  )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: publications
#| output: asis

bib <- suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(read.bib("assets/my-publication-list.bib")))
years_vec <- as.integer(sapply(bib, function(e) e$year))
bib_sorted <- bib[order(years_vec, decreasing = TRUE)]
years_sorted <- as.integer(sapply(bib_sorted, function(e) e$year))
unique_years <- unique(years_sorted)

for (yr in unique_years) {
  cat(paste0('<div class="pub-year-heading" role="heading" aria-level="2">', yr, '</div>\n\n'))

  indices <- which(years_sorted == yr)

  for (i in indices) {
    e <- bib_sorted[[i]]

    title <- gsub("[{}]", "", e$title)

    if (length(e$author) > 6) {
      authors_str <- paste(
        sapply(1:6, function(j) format(e$author[j])),
        collapse = ", "
      )
      authors_str <- paste0(authors_str, ", <em>et al.</em>")
    } else {
      authors_str <- paste(
        sapply(seq_along(e$author), function(j) format(e$author[j])),
        collapse = ", "
      )
    }
    authors_str <- gsub(
      "(L[aá]szl[oó]\\s+Szab[oó]|L\\.\\s+Szab[oó])",
      '<strong class="pub-author-self">\\1</strong>',
      authors_str
    )

    meta_parts <- c()
    if (!is.null(e$journal)) meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, paste0("<em>", e$journal, "</em>"))
    if (!is.null(e$volume))  meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, e$volume)
    if (!is.null(e$number))  meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, paste0("(", e$number, ")"))
    if (!is.null(e$pages))   meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, gsub("--", "\u2013", e$pages))
    meta <- paste(meta_parts, collapse = " ")

    doi      <- if (!is.null(e$doi))      e$doi      else NULL
    pmid     <- if (!is.null(e$pmid))     e$pmid     else NULL
    abstract <- clean_latex(e$abstract)

    cat(pub_card_html(title, authors_str, meta, doi, pmid, abstract))
  }
}
```
